economic_notes: Magnus James Enterprises LP and Magnus James Enterprises Inc. are government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method. Magnus James LP had revenue of $133,160 and expenses of $82,971 for the year. COVID-19 impacted program delivery; ISC approved carry-forward of unexpended funding and one-time PPE funding.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to observe or verify physical inventory counts at March 31, 2021. Province is Ontario (auditors located in Kenora, ON; OFNLP and SLAAMB references consistent with Ontario First Nations). Two GBEs: Magnus James Enterprises LP and Magnus James Enterprises Inc. accounted for by modified equity method. Long-term investments include portfolio investments in K-Net LP, First Nation LP, and NCC Development LP. Accounts payable includes $1,011,865 in contributions repayable. Deferred revenue of $948,876 is entirely ISC funding. No schedule of remuneration provided. OSR calculated as total revenue ($1,804,266) minus total government transfers ($1,022,334) = $781,932. Community and Economic Development expenses of $489,012 reported separately. COVID-19 one-time PPE funding received but amount not separately quantified.
